customer_name: Ervin Miller Marcus Miller Anna May Miller
site_name: Ervin Miller Marcus Miller Anna Mary Miller

citations.narrative:
The unopened food supply was not stored in a manner that protects from contamination and vermin infestation. One bag
was seen to have a pencil-sized hole chewed on the corner and rodent droppings around the hole and on the pallet. The
hole and droppings are signs of rodents getting into the food which can contaminate the food and make animals sick.
Ensure to store and protect the food supply from rodent infestation and contamination.
***Correct by March 30, 2026.

A record for adult vaccination for parvo and distemper was not available (rabies record was available). Without a record
for when adults were vaccinated it cannot be confirmed if adults are getting their routine vaccines as required. Ensure to
maintain records that maintain the names of all vaccines and treatments administered and the dates of administrated for
each dog.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
3.1(e) 
   
Housing facilities, general. 
The unopened food supply was not stored in a manner that protects from contamination and vermin infestation. One bag 
was seen to have a pencil-sized hole chewed on the corner and rodent droppings around the hole and on the pallet. The 
hole and droppings are signs of rodents getting into the food which can contaminate the food and make animals sick. 
Ensure to store and protect the food supply from rodent infestation and contamination.  
***Correct by March 30, 2026. 
3.13(b)(3)  Repeat
   
Veterinary care for dogs. 
A record for adult vaccination for parvo and distemper was not available (rabies record was available). Without a record 
for when adults were vaccinated it cannot be confirmed if adults are getting their routine vaccines as required. Ensure to 
maintain records that maintain the names of all vaccines and treatments administered and the dates of administrated for 
each dog. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
